title: Creaking Totem
description: It's a Totem of Undying, but it looks like the Creaking Mob
body:
A creaking is an upcoming hostile mob that is spawned by creaking hearts at night or during thunderstorms. It only moves when there are no players looking at it. It cannot be damaged, and can be killed only by destroying its respective creaking heart when naturally spawned.

**THIS IS ONLY A RESOURCE PACK AND IT DOESN'T ADD THE CREAKING MOB ITSELF.**

Works with overlays.
Works on versions 1.19-1.21.1 (tested on 1.21.1, 1.20.4 and 1.19.4)

Message row741 on Discord if you have any problem or texture pack suggestion.
